rules.rule_text:
title: WMImplant Hack Tool
id: 8028c2c3-e25a-46e3-827f-bbb5abf181d7
status: test
description: Detects parameters used by WMImplant
references:
- https://github.com/FortyNorthSecurity/WMImplant
author: NVISO
date: 2020-03-26
modified: 2022-12-25
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
- attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: ps_script
  definition: 'Requirements: Script Block Logging must be enabled'
detection:
  selection:
    ScriptBlockText|contains:
    - WMImplant
    - ' change_user '
    - ' gen_cli '
    - ' command_exec '
    - ' disable_wdigest '
    - ' disable_winrm '
    - ' enable_wdigest '
    - ' enable_winrm '
    - ' registry_mod '
    - ' remote_posh '
    - ' sched_job '
    - ' service_mod '
    - ' process_kill '
    - ' active_users '
    - ' basic_info '
    - ' power_off '
    - ' vacant_system '
    - ' logon_events '
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Administrative scripts that use the same keywords.
level: high
